lifecycles.status_rationale: No reconveyance found in corpus for DOT 20210057847

No release, assignment, or reconveyance located in the searched corpus for HOGUE 2015 DOT. Maricopa public API does not support name-filtered document search, so a release outside the curated HOGUE chain cannot be ruled out via the API alone.

Seville Parcel 3 subdivision encumbrances. Root plat (20010093192, Book 554 Maps Page 19) dedicates public utility easements, HOA-maintained tracts, and building setbacks that run with the land and bind every lot in the subdivision including POPHAM's Lot 46. The 2001-09-17 Affidavit of Correction (20010849180) by the subdivision's registered land surveyor is a modification_of the plat — it cures the erroneous HOA-signature-block requirement and is cross-referenced in every downstream deed's legal description. Marked 'released' in the sense that the plat's one open loose-end (the HOA signature gap) was itself cured of record.

No reconveyance found in corpus for WARNER FHA-insured DOT (Academy Mortgage Corporation, FHA Case #023-5190155-703, MIN 100060800022764581). Lot 52, Seville Parcel 3. Loan has been open since 2013-01-28; maturity date 2043-02-01. MERS is beneficiary as nominee for Academy Mortgage.

No reconveyance, substitution of trustee, or subsequent refinance DOT found in corpus for LOWRY 2007 Countrywide Interest-Only ARM (MIN 1000157-0008292767-0). Lot 61, Seville Parcel 3. Pre-crash subprime-era loan; Countrywide was acquired by Bank of America in July 2008. Any downstream assignment, release, or refinance would typically be executed by Bank of America Home Loans or a securitization trust successor servicer. Phase 2 recording-number probes for a 2020–2021 refinance were not productive (API name search broken — see R-007 hunt log).

No release, substitution of trustee, or assignment of deed of trust located in the searched corpus for ANGUS 2020 United Wholesale Mortgage DOT. R-006 sub-hunt 2 ran against publicapi.recorder.maricopa.gov without a hit — the public API silently drops every search filter (name, documentCode, recordingDate) and returns the same 1947-seeded page regardless, so a release filed against PHOENIX VACATION HOUSES LLC outside this parcel's curated corpus cannot be located via the public API. See data/raw/R-006/hunt-log.md. The CandidateReleasesPanel renders its cross-parcel empty-state moat note on this lifecycle — a county-internal full-name scan would close this gap.

Active HOA lien recorded by Seville Homeowners Association against Lot 45 (Phoenix Vacation Houses LLC) for delinquent assessments covering 2022-04-01 through 2022-12-31. No release, withdrawal, or payoff recorded in corpus. Demo-only synthesized instance — see 20230100000 source_note and data/raw/R-006/hunt-log.md for the failed recorded-lien hunt that this synthesis stands in for.

Demo-only synthetic junior HELOC DOT (Desert Schools Federal Credit Union, $45,000) recorded 2019-02-14 on WARNER parcel 304-78-374 (Lot 52, Seville Parcel 3). No release or payoff recorded in corpus. Sits junior to the open 2013 FHA-insured senior DOT (20130087109, Academy Mortgage Corporation, $270,146) — two overlapping open lifecycles on one parcel. Both must be addressed at closing. See an-007 (Junior-lien priority interpretation).

Demo-only synthetic 2008 Wells Fargo purchase-money DOT on CHEN parcel 999-01-362 (probate scenario). Released 2019-03-22 by full reconveyance 20190200001 — mortgage paid in full before either spouse's death, so the probate chain (Lilian's AF DEATH 20230200001, Robert's PR DEED 20240200001) transfers unencumbered fee to the heir.

Demo-only synthetic 2016 Chase purchase-money DOT on MARTINEZ parcel 999-02-555 (divorce quit-claim scenario). Borrowers are CARLOS A MARTINEZ and SOFIA ANDREA MARTINEZ jointly and severally per original DOT. The 2021 divorce decree (20210200001) and subsequent quit-claim (20210200002) transferred record title to Sofia only, but did NOT release Carlos from the note — he remains contingently liable on debt secured by property he no longer owns of record. The 2022 assignment to Mr. Cooper (20220200001) is a servicing transfer and does not alter the borrower names. Examiner must raise: confirm lender release of Carlos or refinance into Sofia-only loan before closing.

Demo-only synthetic 2017 Quicken Loans (now Rocket Mortgage) purchase-money DOT on DELGADO parcel 999-03-411 (LLC-conveyance scenario). DOT remains in MARIA ELENA DELGADO's individual name even after the 2022-11-08 individual-to-LLC conveyance (20220200003). Due-on-sale clause under 12 USC § 1701j-3 is technically available to the lender but rarely enforced for owner-occupied SFR transferred to a grantor-owned pass-through LLC. No assumption agreement has been recorded. Examiner must disclose: (a) due-on-sale exposure, (b) note remains in individual name despite LLC title, (c) Rocket Mortgage successor-in-interest to Quicken Loans but no assignment of DOT recorded.

Demo-only synthetic 2005 Countrywide Home Loans purchase-money DOT on BRYANT parcel 999-04-401 (tax-sale REO scenario). The DOT was EXTINGUISHED BY OPERATION OF LAW under A.R.S. § 42-18267 upon recording of the 2022-06-15 Treasurer's Deed (20220200005) — tax liens take priority over all junior encumbrances. However, no release was ever recorded, and no successor-in-interest quit-claim has been obtained from Bank of America (Countrywide's 2008 acquirer) or any securitization trust. The DOT therefore appears 'open' in a raw index query but is substantively cleared by operation of law. Examiner must flag this as a Schedule B exception with a specific quiet-title rationale, or obtain a corrective quit-claim to cure the record.

Demo-only synthetic lifecycle on POPHAM's reconstructed pre-2013 chain. The 2002 Roberts-family purchase-money DOT (20020100002, Wells Fargo Home Mortgage, MERS as nominee) was fully reconveyed by Wells Fargo Bank NA on 2005-07-22 (20050100001). Pattern echoes the real 2013 POPHAM DOT (20130183450) → 2021 release (20210075858) pair: originator differs from releasing party, note transferred inside MERS. Included to show continuity of the MERS-disintermediation pattern across two ownership eras.

Demo-only synthetic Notice of Federal Tax Lien (IRS Form 668(Y), serial 768349201-24) against POPHAM CHRISTOPHER J for unpaid 2019 and 2020 Form 1040 liabilities totaling $47,312.48. Recorded 2024-03-12. No Certificate of Release (Form 668(Z)) located in corpus. Lien self-releases by operation of law on 2032-09-14 if not refiled (26 U.S.C. § 6325(f)(1)), so the cloud is time-limited — but examiner must resolve before closing. Currently the senior encumbrance of record against this parcel (the 2013 Wells Fargo DOT was released 2021-01-22). Demo-only because the Maricopa public API silently drops the documentCode filter, so federal tax liens are unreachable by code-scoped search in plant products (see docs/hunt-log-known-gap-2.md) — making this exactly the cloud the county product is uniquely positioned to surface.
